prompt: Create a vertical polished hard-boiled graphic-novel character poster in the style of official Rockstar Games concept art. Show one intimidating outlaw/gunslinger figure centered in the frame, occupying the lower 75% of the image, while the top 25% remains mostly empty solid blood-red background with subtle gritty black brush smears and splatter texture near the horizon. The character wears a glossy black wide-brim cowboy hat, black leather trench coat with sharp lapels, black pinstripe waistcoat, black shirt, black neck scarf or tie, and black leather gloves. The face is deliberately hidden by a centered dark brown-to-black square censor block covering the entire facial area from below the hat brim to the chin, leaving only ears and a small hint of lower jaw visible. Pose: front-facing, shoulders squared, stern and statuesque, both arms bent at the waist while holding exactly two long-barreled revolvers crossed in an X shape across the torso, barrels angled upward toward opposite sides, wooden grips visible near the bottom. Use dramatic noir lighting, deep shadows, high-contrast inked outlines, painterly highlights on the shiny leather and gunmetal, gritty western crime mood, cinematic poster composition, no text, no logo, no watermark. Character details may be customized as faceless black-clad outlaw gunslinger, weapon as two long-barreled revolvers crossed across the chest, attire as glossy black cowboy hat, leather trench coat, pinstripe waistcoat, black shirt, neck scarf, and leather gloves, background color as solid blood-red, and pose as front-facing with squared shoulders and crossed revolvers.
